app.page_title: Meme Detector — Spot Gems in Memecoins
app.about: Meme Detector analyzes thousands of memecoins with ML to find the next 10x+ gems.
app.sidebar_description: **Gem Detector** - Machine Learning tool to analyze memecoins and detect which ones have potential to be 'gems' (10x+).

auth.login_subtitle: Memecoin Gem Detector powered by Machine Learning
auth.password_hint: Minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter and one number
auth.reset_email_label: Enter your email to reset your password
auth.reset_success: We have sent you an email to reset your password. Check your inbox.
auth.register_success: Account created. Check your email to confirm and then you can log in.
auth.tos_notice: By creating your account you accept the Terms of Service.
auth.error_already_registered: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
auth.error_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.error_password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.error_password_digit: Password must contain at least one number.
auth.error_no_password_configured: DASHBOARD_PASSWORD not configured on the server.
